EmailTemplate.name: Digital Booking Online-Customer
EmailTemplate.subject: Digital Booking Amount Recieved
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Booking__c.Primary_Applicant_Name__c} ,
This is with reference to your Payment received in our system. We are glad to inform you that we have received a payment of Rs {!Amount} from your end towards Digital booking. Thank You for the prompt payment.
You may call on {!SMPhoneNumber} for any assistance.
Regards, Runwal Group
